torch.name: Torch
torch.desc: Pushes back the dark. For a while.

rope.name: Hempen Rope
rope.desc: Fifty feet. Everyone needs rope eventually.

mysterious_key.name: Mysterious Key
mysterious_key.desc: Old Fenwick won't say what it opens. He won't stop smiling, either.

water.name: Waterskin
water.desc: Cold from the well. The good stuff.

herring.name: Silver Herring
herring.desc: Small, quick, and everywhere — most days. Use it near a fire to cook.

bass.name: Harbor Bass
bass.desc: Puts up a fight. Worth it. Use it near a fire to cook.

perch.name: Rock Perch
perch.desc: Lurks near the stones. Suspicious of everything. Use it near a fire to cook.

old_boot.name: Old Boot
old_boot.desc: Not even a matching pair. The sea mocks you.

cooked_herring.name: Smoked Herring
cooked_herring.desc: Golden and glistening. Worth the smoke in your eyes.

rune_shard.name: Rune Shard
rune_shard.desc: A splinter of somewhere else. It hums when the cave is near.
